title: MyCandyShop FIzzy Dummies 500g - Pick and Mix Sweets in Bulk Cheap - Sour Dummy Candies 500g Bag, Mouthwatering Jelly Flavours Perfect for Sweet Cravings and Party Favours
features: Enjoy a fun twist on classic retro sweets with our sour sweets mix, perfect for candy lovers who crave a tangy kick and a touch of nostalgia in every bite.
Stock up your sweet stash with bulk sweets in a convenient size - our sweets 500g bag offers a generous mix that’s perfect for sharing or party tables.
Dive into fizzy sweets and pick n mix sweets all in one bag - a flavorful combo of chewy, zesty, and fun shapes that everyone will love to grab and munch.
Perfect for celebrations - our birthday sweets are packed in colourful pick and mix bags, making them ideal treats for party tables and candy buffets.
From playful gummy sweets to classic party sweets - this cheerful variety will keep everyone smiling, a perfect addition to kids’ events or special occasions.
description: Product description Get ready for a tongue - tingling treat with our jelly filled sweets packed in a vibrant 500g bag! This fun selection brings together the best of bags of sweets and bulk buy sweets, making it a perfect choice for those who love variety and value. Each jelly bag is loaded with colourful pick n mix bags of sour candy that delivers a delicious punch of flavour. Perfect as party bag sweets for kids, this sweet bag is also ideal for sharing at gatherings, parties, or as a fun treat at home. With a carefully selected range of mixed sweets and chewy pic n mix sweets, every bite is a surprise of fruity delight. Our classic fruit dummy shapes are made to resemble gummy food and offer a nostalgic twist with a tangy finish. Whether you’re treating yourself or filling up snack bowls, these fruit dummy sweets are sure to be a hit! Ingredients Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Apple Juice From Concentrate,Corn Starch,Halal Beef Gelatine, Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid), Acids (Tartaric Acid, Malic Acid), Flavourings, Fruit and Vegetable Juice Concentrates (Radish, Apple, Blackcurrant, Black Carrot), Colours (Copper Complexes of Chlorophillins,Paprika Extract, Lutein ) Directions Enjoy directly from the bag. Not suitable for children under 3 years due to choking hazard. See more
